content:
⸻

Final Portfolio Submission (Week 6)

In Week 6, compile all your final drafts into one portfolio document. The portfolio should include:
• A cover page with your name and course details.
• Final versions of your Narrative, Process Analysis, Compare & Contrast, and Persuasive Essays.
• A reflective summary that explains your growth as a writer over the 6 weeks.
• Follow the final portfolio rubric provided in the “Final Exam Module.”

⸻

This comprehensive navigation and overview should provide clear direction each week, ensuring that you stay organized, engage deeply with peer feedback, and reflect critically on your revisions.

Would you like to adjust or add any specific elements, or shall we finalize this as your course module navigation guide?

⸻
